mapper.select: SELECT * FROM menu WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY sort_no
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY sort_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu (id, parent_id, name, path, component, icon, sort_no, type, permission, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{sortNo}, #{type}, #{permission}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, type = #{type}, permission = #{permission}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_date = #{updateDate}, flag = #{flag} WHERE id = #{id}
